params.name: Quantum Cat
params.description:
On May 15, 1870 AD, the world's first Fortune Cat appeared in Japan and became popular across Asia.
Cat became popular in the Edo Period of Japan as people believed that the mysterious cats could protect their food from rats. Cats gradually became a symbol of wealth. Later, people started placing Fortune Cats at home as they symbolized good fortune and abundance.
